name: Ribbed Brass Battery Rechargeable Thumb Lighter - Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia
description:
Lighting candles, incense and more will be easier than ever with this Ribbed Brass Battery Rechargeable Thumb Lighter from Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia. Made from brass-finish metal, this electric thumb lighter is easy to use and features a safety lock. The rechargeable battery offers lasting use, and it comes with a USB-A to USB-C charging cable for your convenience.

Hearth & Hand™ with Magnolia: Gather • Create • Enjoy
